message:
test: update TUI policy guard test and add verification artifacts

- tui_policy_guard.rs: Updated test to cover additional policy
  controller integration paths discovered during conformance runs.
- artifacts/: Initial verification artifacts from conformance and
  attestation test runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --all-targets
+cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test storage_adapter
+cargo test -p frankenengine-engine storage_adapter::
+cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --all-targets -- -D warnings

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+{
+  "component": "storage_adapter",
